## User Story
As a **[type of user]**,
I want to **[do something]**,
so that **[I get some benefit]**.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like. How should it work?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Add any mockups, references, or extra context here.
